_bk;t=1774282504526~~~ Running global checkout hook
_bk;t=1774282504528[90m$[0m /clima/slurm-buildkite/hooks/checkout
_bk;t=1774282504543
_bk;t=1774282504543if [ ! -d "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}/.git" ]; then
_bk;t=1774282504543    echo "--- Init clone and checkout" 
_bk;t=1774282504543    COUNT=1
_bk;t=1774282504543    while true; do
_bk;t=1774282504543        git clone ${BUILDKITE_GIT_CLONE_FLAGS} ${BUILDKITE_REPO} "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1774282504543        if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
_bk;t=1774282504543            break
_bk;t=1774282504543        fi
_bk;t=1774282504543        if [[ $COUNT -ge 3 ]]; then
_bk;t=1774282504543            echo "Clone ${BUILDKITE_REPO} failed after 3 attempts"
_bk;t=1774282504543            exit 1
_bk;t=1774282504543        else
_bk;t=1774282504543            echo "Clone ${BUILDKITE_REPO} failed, retrying..."
_bk;t=1774282504543            sleep 30s
_bk;t=1774282504543        fi 
_bk;t=1774282504543        let COUNT=COUNT+1
_bk;t=1774282504543    done
_bk;t=1774282504543    cd "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1774282504543    if [ "$BUILDKITE_COMMIT" = "HEAD" ]; then
_bk;t=1774282504543        git checkout -f "${BUILDKITE_BRANCH}"
_bk;t=1774282504543    else
_bk;t=1774282504543        git checkout -f "${BUILDKITE_COMMIT}"
_bk;t=1774282504543    fi
_bk;t=1774282504543    # emulate https://github.com/buildkite/agent/blob/7e0166eebed5bf3cc289edae97145803429e75f9/bootstrap/bootstrap.go#L1448-L1458
_bk;t=1774282504543    if ! buildkite-agent meta-data exists "buildkite:git:commit" ; then
_bk;t=1774282504543        echo "Sending Git commit information to Buildkite"
_bk;t=1774282504543        git --no-pager show HEAD -s --format=fuller --no-color -- | buildkite-agent meta-data set "buildkite:git:commit"
_bk;t=1774282504543    fi
_bk;t=1774282504543else
_bk;t=1774282504543    echo "--- Using cached git repo ${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1774282504543    cd "${BUILDKITE_BUILD_CHECKOUT_PATH}"
_bk;t=1774282504543fi
